title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nestle India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nestle India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nestle India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Nestle India:
Nestle India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nestle India!
